name: Oven Baked Crab Cakes from the Sea Grill Restaurant
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulse cornflakes in a food processor until ground coarse and spread in a shallow baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, mustard, Old Bay seasoning, cayenne, and egg yolks. Add crab meat and season with salt and pepper to taste, tossing mixture gently but thoroughly.
3. Using a 1/4 cup measure, form the mixture into slightly flattened rounds about 2 1/2 inches wide and 3/4 inch thick. Gently coat each crab cake with cornflakes.
4. Transfer coated crab cakes to a wax-paper-lined baking sheet. Chill crab cakes, covered with plastic wrap, for at least 2 hours and up to 4 hours.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F.
6. Place crab cakes on a large baking sheet. Add about 1/2 teaspoon of butter to each cake.
7. Bake in the middle of the oven until crisp and cooked through, about 15 minutes.
8. Serve with tartar sauce.
